problem id: e0918834
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10011101 -> 01000100
  01110000 -> 00000011
  11110000 -> 00000111
  10001111 -> 11000100
  00110111 -> 11000001
  11011011 -> 11000110
  01110011 -> 11000011
  00001110 -> 10000000

query: 11111110
predicted answer: 10000111
